items.summary: Create backend test functions in main.mo that generate three test profiles: (1) Healthy User with all section scores in 30-40 range and no medical history, (2) Moderate Issues user with scores in 21-30 range and 'BP' medical history, (3) Serious Concerns user with scores in 0-20 range and 'Sugar, BP' medical history. Each profile must have realistic score patterns automatically generated across all 40 questions based on the profile type.

Add backend verification functions that process each test profile through the pattern analysis engine and log complete results to console, including detected low-scoring questions, identified patterns, generated solution tips, and medical history integration effects.

Create a frontend Test Mode page accessible only for internal developer testing that displays all three test profiles with their complete analysis results including section scores, detected patterns, solution tips, and medical history effects in a visual format matching the existing results page design.
